title: 3D Model for Sugar Cane
description: This texture pack changes the model of the sugar cane from 2D to brand new 3D look!!
body:
## Doesn't need anything additionally to make it work!

#### Well I don't think the OG sugar cane is bad or anything like that, buuuuut it gives a little bit of freshness to the game

this texture pack isn't for everyone but I personally love the the brand new 3D model for sugar cane _now in my
opinion it will fit better with his brother-in-law bamboo_

### Instructions how to use for dummies:
1. Just Install it
2. Put it in the texture pack folder
3. Turn it on and you good to go!
